name: college-tools
description: Google Apps Script project for college selection and tracking

scripts.dev: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory docs
scripts.check: npm run lint:check && npm run test
scripts.prepush: npm run check && echo 'Checks passed - ready for clasp push'
scripts.push: npm run check && npx clasp push
scripts.version:patch: npm run version:update $(node -p "require('./package.json').version.replace(/(.+\\.)?(\\d+)$/, (_, p, n) => p + (+n + 1))")
scripts.version:minor: npm run version:update $(node -p "require('./package.json').version.replace(/(\\d+\\.)(\\d+)(\\..+)/, (_, maj, min, patch) => maj + (+min + 1) + '.0')")
scripts.release:prepare: npm run check && npm run version:patch
scripts.release:clasp: npm run check && npx clasp push && npx clasp version

author: College Tools
